summary: Completed frontend-only validation for Family.co-inspired signup/onboarding redesign and route regression. All requested flows passed in missing Clerk/Stripe/API config environment with graceful fallback/error states.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for this frontend redesign scope.
Optional maintainability: split /app/frontend/styles.css (>1900 lines) into smaller modules.
Optional environment consistency: add frontend .env if team workflow depends on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL file presence.
critical_code_review_comments: Maintainability risk: /app/frontend/styles.css is very large (>700 lines guideline).
Repo/setup inconsistency: /app/frontend/.env and /app/auth_testing.md are missing from current workspace paths.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed UI automation against http://localhost:3000. Verified: signup merchant/affiliate Family-style rendering, role switcher and slug dual preview updates, Clerk missing-config fallback, onboarding connect error handling via existing /api/connect/onboard call path, onboarding success CTA routing by role, landing+dashboard routes intact, critical data-testid selectors present, and no horizontal overflow on tested desktop/mobile routes.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue reproduced. 503s seen during Connect click are expected here because API_BASE_URL is not configured; UI converts this to a friendly onboarding error message.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md: no credentials required for this static frontend scope.
